nasb.text: Then Balak said to Balaam, “What have you done to me? I took you to curse my enemies, but behold, you have actually blessed them!”

esv.text: And Balak said to Balaam, “What have you done to me? I took you to curse my enemies, and behold, you have done nothing but bless them.”

cnv.text: 巴勒對巴蘭說：“你向我作的是甚麼事呢？我領你來咒詛我的仇敵，你反倒給他們祝福。”

ccb.text: 巴勒对巴兰说：“你这是做什么？我请你来咒诅我的仇敌，你竟祝福他们！”
